subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O Lord of Names! I extol Thee and render thanks unto Thee, O Thou in Whose hands is the kingdom of destiny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی لک الثناء یا مالک الاسماء احمدک و اشکرک یا من بیدک ملکوت القضاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
